label: Coalition Legitimacy Model
description: TSMM-native profile for legitimacy conditions in multi-actor governance coalitions.

nodes.label: Coalition authority
nodes.description: Collective authority formed by multiple actors.

nodes.label: Coalition participant set
nodes.description: Participants represented as a governed coalition subject.

nodes.label: Coalition legitimacy policy
nodes.description: Policy defining membership, voting, and appeal requirements.

nodes.label: Capture risk assessment
nodes.description: Assessment of concentration, opacity, and contestability risks.

nodes.label: Coalition governance evidence
nodes.description: Evidence of composition, process, and publication.

nodes.label: Coalition legitimacy decision
nodes.description: Decision on whether coalition governance remains legitimate.

nodes.label: Coalition authority effect
nodes.description: Allows coalition decisions to bind, be restricted, or be suspended.

edges.description: Coalition authority governs the legitimacy policy.
Policy constrains coalition membership and operation.
Assessment evaluates capture risk and legitimacy conditions.
Decision determines whether coalition authority remains binding.
